_doc: Launch original sectional — Time & Work. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: A can finish a work in 12 days and B in 18 days. Working together, how many days will they take?
questions.stem_hi: A कोई work 12 days में और B 18 days में करता है। साथ में कितने days लगेंगे?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Averaged the individual times. Work rates add; times do not average.
options.trap_reason_hi: Individual times का average लिया। Work rates add होते हैं, times नहीं।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Added the two times 12+18. Together they must take less time than either alone.
options.trap_reason_hi: दोनों times add कर दिए। साथ काम करने पर time अकेले से कम होता है।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Picked the faster worker's time. Adding B's rate reduces the time further.
options.trap_reason_hi: Faster worker का time दे दिया। B की rate add होने से time और कम होगा।

questions.explanation_method_en: Combined rate = 1/12+1/18 = (30)/216. Time = 216/30 = 7.2 days. Therefore, answer = 7.2 days.
questions.explanation_concept_en: In work problems, rate is work per day. Workers together add rates, and total time is reciprocal of total rate. Final answer is 7.2 days.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Combined rate = 1/12+1/18 = (30)/216। Time = 216/30 = 7.2 days। अतः answer = 7.2 days।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Work problems में rate = work per day। साथ काम करने पर rates add होते हैं और time total rate का reciprocal होता है। Final answer 7.2 days है।

questions.stem_en: A can finish a work in 12 days. What fraction of work is done by A in 3 days?
questions.stem_hi: A कोई work 12 days में करता है। 3 days में कितना fraction work होगा?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Inverted the fraction. Work done = days worked / total days.
options.trap_reason_hi: Fraction उल्टा कर दिया। Work done = days worked / total days होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Reported remaining work instead of completed work.
options.trap_reason_hi: Completed work की जगह remaining work दिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Used remaining days as denominator. Denominator must be total days 12.
options.trap_reason_hi: Denominator में remaining days ले लिए। Denominator total days 12 होना चाहिए।

questions.explanation_method_en: One-day work = 1/12. In 3 days, work = 3×1/12 = 3/12. Therefore, answer = 3/12.
questions.explanation_concept_en: If total work is 1 unit, a worker completing it in a days does 1/a per day. Multiplying by days worked gives completed fraction. Final answer is 3/12.
questions.explanation_method_hi: One-day work = 1/12। 3 days में work = 3×1/12 = 3/12। अतः answer = 3/12।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Total work को 1 unit मानें। 12 days में complete करने वाला worker रोज 1/12 करता है। Final answer 3/12 है।

questions.stem_en: A and B can finish a work in 10 and 15 days respectively. They earn ₹2500 together. Find A's share.
questions.stem_hi: A और B work को क्रमशः 10 और 15 days में करते हैं। कुल wage ₹2500 है। A का share ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Divided wages equally. Wages should be proportional to work rates, not headcount.
options.trap_reason_hi: Wages बराबर बाँट दिए। Wages work rates के proportional होते हैं।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Reported B's share instead of A's share.
options.trap_reason_hi: A की जगह B का share दे दिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Multiplied total wage by the inverse raw time ratio 15/10. Wage split must use the normalized work-rate ratio.
options.trap_reason_hi: Total wage को inverse raw time ratio 15/10 से multiply किया। Wage split normalized work-rate ratio से होता है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Work-rate ratio A:B = 1/10:1/15 = 15:10. A's share = 2500×15/(10+15) = 1500. Therefore, answer = ₹1500.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Payment follows contribution. Contribution per day is work rate, so the faster worker has the larger share. Final answer is ₹1500.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Payment contribution के हिसाब से होता है। Contribution per day work rate है, इसलिए faster worker का share ज़्यादा होता है। Final answer ₹1500 है।

options.trap_reason_en: Reported B's share instead of A's share.
options.trap_reason_hi: A की जगह B का share दे दिया।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Multiplied total wage by the inverse raw time ratio 18/12. Wage split must use the normalized work-rate ratio.
options.trap_reason_hi: Total wage को inverse raw time ratio 18/12 से multiply किया। Wage split normalized work-rate ratio से होता है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Work-rate ratio A:B = 1/12:1/18 = 18:12. A's share = 3000×18/(12+18) = 1800. Therefore, answer = ₹1800.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Payment follows contribution. Contribution per day is work rate, so the faster worker has the larger share. Final answer is ₹1800.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Payment contribution के हिसाब से होता है। Contribution per day work rate है, इसलिए faster worker का share ज़्यादा होता है। Final answer ₹1800 है।

questions.stem_en: Pipe A fills a tank in 6 hours and pipe B empties it in 12 hours. If both are opened, when will the tank fill?
questions.stem_hi: Pipe A tank को 6 hours में भरता है और pipe B 12 hours में खाली करता है। दोनों open हों तो tank कब भरेगा?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Added filling and emptying rates as if both filled. Emptying rate must subtract.
options.trap_reason_hi: Filling और emptying rates को add कर दिया। Emptying rate subtract होती है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Ignored the leak/emptying pipe B.
options.trap_reason_hi: Emptying pipe B ignore कर दिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Added the separate pipe times 6+12. Net time must come from rates, not time addition.
options.trap_reason_hi: Separate pipe times 6+12 add कर दिए। Net time rates से निकलता है, time addition से नहीं।

questions.explanation_method_en: Net rate = 1/6 - 1/12 = (6)/72. Time = 72/6 = 12 hours. Therefore, answer = 12 hours.
questions.explanation_concept_en: When one pipe empties, its rate opposes the filling pipe. Net work rate is the difference of rates. Final answer is 12 hours.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Net rate = 1/6 - 1/12 = (6)/72। Time = 72/6 = 12 hours। अतः answer = 12 hours।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Emptying pipe filling pipe के opposite काम करता है। Net work rate rates का difference है। Final answer 12 hours है।
